name: Nami Skyla
description: Like the surge and crash of storm waves, a master of the Nami cutlass and Skyla dagger turns these two separate weapons into one fluid attack.

patchlogs.name: Hydroid Prime: Update 21.6.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an issue where Nami Skyla and Nami Skyla Prime were displaying different Riven dispositions.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 17.4.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed building the Nami Skyla rewarding players with the Ninkondi instead.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 13.0.6+13.0.7+13.0.7.1
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed an audio issue with the Nami Skyla not playing slide slash sounds.
Fixed the guard on the Nami Skyla appearing less detailed than it should have.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 13.0.4
patchlogs.fixes: Revised the positions of accessories on the Nami Skyla.
